stemHtml: Which one of the following statements is true about Ice Crystal Icing?

options.a: Ice crystal icing forms at low altitudes and is usually associated with a Cb. It can affect all aircraft.
options.b: Ice crystal icing events are still under investigation and cloud avoidance is required.
options.c: Ice crystals are not very likely to form ice. Ice crystals need a nucleus to form, which is hardly found at high altitudes.
options.d: Ice crystal icing forms at high altitudes and is usually associated with the anvil of a Cb. A high accumulation of ice crystals can damage the engine and even cause engine failure.
